experiment_type: Classifier / unmasked language-form ablation with exploratory held-out confirmation
primary_question: Does an unmasked F8 expressive-form channel add external AD-vs-control diagnostic value beyond fixed earlyv0 + middle v2_full_mean features?
external_interpretation: Exploratory held-out confirmation on a previously inspected external set; external results are not used for model selection.
frozen_feature_source: Copied directly from supplied StageV4 archive; no BGE-M3 or early feature re-extraction is performed.
severity_role: Auxiliary MMSE-stratified severity analysis; not a clinical pathological staging claim.
interpretation_constraint: P4 is unmasked and may retain semantic content. Any diagnostic gain is interpreted as complementary language-form information, not as a content-independent late residual.
